user.generated_text:
I was asking about sustainable ways to take care of plants in my garden...

What are some common garden diseases?

Common garden diseases include mildew and fungal infections. These can be caused by factors such as overwatering or poor ventilation.

Speaking of water conservation is an important aspect of gardening. When choosing a fertilizer for your plants consider using compost. It's beneficial for soil health and helps with plant growth.

By the way if you have time I recommend watching the movie "The Secret Garden". It's a delightful story about gardens and friendship.

Do you have any favorite gardening tools? Some find trowels quite useful for cultivating the soil.
